abstract: Metadata keys for Exchangeable Image File Format (EXIF) data.
rawMarkdown:
---
source: https://developer.apple.com/documentation/ImageIO/exif-dictionary-keys
crawled: 2025-12-12T00:45:00Z

# EXIF Dictionary Keys

**API Collection**

Metadata keys for Exchangeable Image File Format (EXIF) data.

## Dictionaries

- **kCGImagePropertyExifDictionary**: A dictionary of key-value pairs for an image that uses Exchangeable Image File Format (EXIF).
- **kCGImagePropertyExifAuxDictionary**: An auxiliary dictionary of key-value pairs for an image that uses Exchangeable Image File Format (EXIF).

## Camera Settings

- **kCGImagePropertyExifDeviceSettingDescription**: For a particular camera mode, indicates the conditions for taking the picture.
- **kCGImagePropertyExifFNumber**: The F-number.
- **kCGImagePropertyExifShutterSpeedValue**: The shutter speed value.
- **kCGImagePropertyExifApertureValue**: The aperture value.
- **kCGImagePropertyExifMaxApertureValue**: The maximum aperture value.
- **kCGImagePropertyExifFocalLength**: The focal length.
- **kCGImagePropertyExifSpectralSensitivity**: The spectral sensitivity of each channel.
- **kCGImagePropertyExifISOSpeedRatings**: The ISO speed ratings.
- **kCGImagePropertyExifSubjectDistance**: The distance to the subject, in meters.
- **kCGImagePropertyExifMeteringMode**: The metering mode.
- **kCGImagePropertyExifSubjectArea**: The subject area.
- **kCGImagePropertyExifSubjectLocation**: The location of the image’s primary subject.
- **kCGImagePropertyExifSensingMethod**: The sensor type of the camera or input device.
- **kCGImagePropertyExifSceneType**: The scene type.
- **kCGImagePropertyExifDigitalZoomRatio**: The digital zoom ratio.
- **kCGImagePropertyExifFocalLenIn35mmFilm**: The equivalent focal length in 35 mm film.
- **kCGImagePropertyExifSceneCaptureType**: The scene capture type; for example, standard, landscape, portrait, or night.
- **kCGImagePropertyExifSubjectDistRange**: The distance to the subject.

## Exposure

- **kCGImagePropertyExifExposureTime**: The exposure time.
- **kCGImagePropertyExifExposureProgram**: The exposure program.
- **kCGImagePropertyExifExposureIndex**: The selected exposure index.
- **kCGImagePropertyExifExposureMode**: The exposure mode setting.
- **kCGImagePropertyExifISOSpeed**: The ISO speed setting used to capture the image.
- **kCGImagePropertyExifISOSpeedLatitudeyyy**: The ISO speed latitude yyy value.
- **kCGImagePropertyExifISOSpeedLatitudezzz**: The ISO speed latitude zzz value.
- **kCGImagePropertyExifRecommendedExposureIndex**: The recommended exposure index.
- **kCGImagePropertyExifExposureBiasValue**: The exposure bias value.
- **kCGImagePropertyExifSensitivityType**: The type of sensitivity data stored for the image.
- **kCGImagePropertyExifStandardOutputSensitivity**: The sensitivity data for the image.
- **kCGImagePropertyExifSourceExposureTimesOfCompositeImage**: The exposure times for composite images.

## Image Quality

- **kCGImagePropertyExifCFAPattern**: The color filter array (CFA) pattern, which is the geometric pattern of the image sensor for a 1-chip color sensor area.
- **kCGImagePropertyExifBrightnessValue**: The brightness value.
- **kCGImagePropertyExifLightSource**: The light source.
- **kCGImagePropertyExifFlash**: The flash status when the image was shot.
- **kCGImagePropertyExifSpatialFrequencyResponse**: The spatial frequency table and spatial frequency response values in the width, height, and diagonal directions.
- **kCGImagePropertyExifContrast**: The contrast setting.
- **kCGImagePropertyExifSaturation**: The saturation setting.
- **kCGImagePropertyExifSharpness**: The sharpness setting.
- **kCGImagePropertyExifGamma**: The gamma setting.
- **kCGImagePropertyExifWhiteBalance**: The white balance mode.

## Image Settings

- **kCGImagePropertyExifGainControl**: The gain adjustment setting.
- **kCGImagePropertyExifImageUniqueID**: The unique ID of the image.
- **kCGImagePropertyExifCompressedBitsPerPixel**: The bits per pixel of the compression mode.
- **kCGImagePropertyExifColorSpace**: The color space.
- **kCGImagePropertyExifPixelXDimension**: The x dimension of a pixel.
- **kCGImagePropertyExifPixelYDimension**: The y dimension of a pixel.
- **kCGImagePropertyExifRelatedSoundFile**: A sound file related to the image.
- **kCGImagePropertyExifFocalPlaneXResolution**: The number of image-width pixels (x-axis) per focal plane resolution unit.
- **kCGImagePropertyExifFocalPlaneYResolution**: The number of image-height pixels (y-axis) per focal plane resolution unit.
- **kCGImagePropertyExifFocalPlaneResolutionUnit**: The unit of measurement for the focal plane x and y resolutions.
- **kCGImagePropertyExifCustomRendered**: Special  rendering performed on the image data.
- **kCGImagePropertyExifCompositeImage**
- **kCGImagePropertyExifOECF**: The opto-electric conversion function (OECF) that defines the relationship between the optical input of the camera and the resulting image.
- **kCGImagePropertyExifComponentsConfiguration**: The components configuration for compressed data.
- **kCGImagePropertyExifSourceImageNumberOfCompositeImage**: The number of images that make up a composite image.
- **kCGImagePropertyExifFileSource**: The image source.

## Timestamp

- **kCGImagePropertyExifDateTimeOriginal**: The original date and time.
- **kCGImagePropertyExifDateTimeDigitized**: The digitized date and time.
- **kCGImagePropertyExifSubsecTime**: The fraction of seconds for the date and time tag.
- **kCGImagePropertyExifSubsecTimeOrginal**: The fraction of seconds for the original date and time tag.
- **kCGImagePropertyExifSubsecTimeOriginal**: The fraction of seconds for the original date and time tag.
- **kCGImagePropertyExifSubsecTimeDigitized**: The fraction of seconds for the digitized date and time tag.
- **kCGImagePropertyExifOffsetTime**
- **kCGImagePropertyExifOffsetTimeOriginal**
- **kCGImagePropertyExifOffsetTimeDigitized**

## Lens Information

- **kCGImagePropertyExifLensSpecification**: The specification information for the camera lens.
- **kCGImagePropertyExifLensMake**: A string with the name of the lens manufacturer.
- **kCGImagePropertyExifLensModel**: A string with the lens model information.
- **kCGImagePropertyExifLensSerialNumber**: A string with the lens’s serial number.

## Camera Information

- **kCGImagePropertyExifMakerNote**: Information specified by the camera manufacturer.
- **kCGImagePropertyExifUserComment**: A user comment.
- **kCGImagePropertyExifCameraOwnerName**: A string with the name of the camera’s owner.
- **kCGImagePropertyExifBodySerialNumber**: A string with the serial number of the camera.

## Flash Information

- **kCGImagePropertyExifFlashPixVersion**: The FlashPix version supported by an FPXR file.
- **kCGImagePropertyExifFlashEnergy**: The strobe energy when the image was captured, in beam candle power seconds.

## Auxiliary Keys

- **kCGImagePropertyExifAuxLensInfo**: Lens information.
- **kCGImagePropertyExifAuxLensModel**: The lens model.
- **kCGImagePropertyExifAuxSerialNumber**: The serial number.
- **kCGImagePropertyExifAuxLensID**: The lens ID.
- **kCGImagePropertyExifAuxLensSerialNumber**: The lens serial number.
- **kCGImagePropertyExifAuxImageNumber**: The image number.
- **kCGImagePropertyExifAuxFlashCompensation**: Flash compensation.
- **kCGImagePropertyExifAuxOwnerName**: The owner name.
- **kCGImagePropertyExifAuxFirmware**: Firmware information.

## EXIF Format

- **kCGImagePropertyExifVersion**: The EXIF version.

## Common Image Properties

- **Image Properties**: Properties that apply to the container in general, and not necessarily to an individual image in the container.
- **IPTC Dictionary Keys**: Metadata keys for International Press Telecommunications Council (IPTC) data.
- **GPS Dictionary Keys**: Keys for Global Positioning System (GPS) information.
- **WebP Data**: Metadata keys for WebP metadata.
